scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "api,messaging,mobile" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:messaging" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.lint: npm --workspace api run lint && npm --workspace mobile run lint && npm --workspace glunity-messaging-service run lint
scripts.test: npm --workspace api run test && npm --workspace mobile run test && npm --workspace glunity-messaging-service run test
